## Meeting Purpose

[Operations interview with Alexa Santiago for Account Strategist role at Growth.com](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Alexa has extensive experience in ad tech and content marketing, currently working at Seros (interactive content platform)](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Growth.com is in early stages, building out processes and tackling capacity planning challenges](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Company culture emphasizes experimentation, ownership, and ability to thrive in ambiguity](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Alexa demonstrated strong skills in creating processes, documentation, and scaling efficiencies](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)

## Topics

### Alexa's Background and Experience

  - [Previously worked at Razorfish, Quantcast, and currently at Seros (200-person company)](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Extensive experience in ad tech and content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Familiar with publisher/media agency clients (e.g., Morning Brew, Hearst, Condé Nast)](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Demonstrated ability to create processes and documentation in ambiguous environments](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)

### Seros Product and Business Model

  - [No-code design platform for creating immersive, interactive content experiences](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Subscription-based model with unlimited content creation](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Offers in-house agency and freelance network for additional design support](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Primarily targets publishers and media agencies](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Recently redefined Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) to focus on more suitable clients](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)

### Growth.com Current State and Challenges

  - [Early-stage company with many processes still being built out](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Recently switched to HubSpot, still setting up renewal operations](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Capacity planning is a significant challenge due to agency-like model](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Need to develop different service tiers for SMB vs. enterprise clients](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Exploring ways to make the team more efficient and prevent scope creep](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)

### Company Culture and Leadership

  - [Experimental culture, open to trying new approaches](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Influenced by Netflix and Basecamp philosophies (high-performer oriented, manager-of-one mentality)](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [CEO (Marcel) is highly involved and hands-on in all aspects of the business](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=2332.0)
  - [Emphasis on unlearning traditional SaaS practices and embracing AI-native approach](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=2228.0)

### AI and Automation Tools

  - [Alexa uses ChatGPT for account history, strategy outreach, and industry news automation](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Growth.com developing an AI-powered platform for content creation and editing](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tucker to coordinate a take-home presentation exercise as the next step in the interview process](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=2709.0)
  - [Alexa to prepare for an interactive session to demonstrate how she would work with the team](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=2722.0)
  - [Growth.com to consider Alexa's experience in creating processes and documentation for potential role fit](https://fathom.video/share/h1zTgKyQL5NuCoQoTip1wKrELqVY_jk_?tab=summary&timestamp=2722.0)
